content_hints.description: All areas of the vault have the following features: Any spell that tries to contact a creature in the vault fails, as does any spell that attempts to scry on the vault interior or any creatures within. Teleporting into the vault from outside is impossible. Walls are made of mortared stone, and doors are solid stone slabs with stone handles and hinges.
content_hints.read_aloud: You descend into a vast chamber where the walls are made of mortared stone, solid slabs of stone doors with stone handles and hinges. The air is still, and you notice the cold, unyielding nature of the architecture surrounding you.

npcs.name: Aurinax
npcs.role: adult gold dragon named Aurinax guards the vault.

event_triggers: On entry: The Stone of Golorr grows warm and tugs gently downward, guiding you deeper.

content_hints.description: A 20-foot-high, 20-foot-wide stone corridor ends before an adamantine double door bearing Dwarvish runes. The doors have neither handles nor hinges, and the writing on them reads, “THETHREE KEYS. BRING THEM FORTH.”
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see a 20-foot-high, 20-foot-wide stone corridor ending before an adamantine double door bearing Dwarvish runes. The doors have neither handles nor hinges, and the writing on them reads, “THETHREE KEYS. BRING THEM FORTH.”

npcs.name: Victoro Cassalanter
npcs.role: is in charge of locating the Vault of Dragons and securing the gold within it.

event_triggers: On trap triggered: The Stone of Golorr flashes in warning a heartbeat too late.

content_hints.description: The Vault of Dragons is guarded by a gold dragon who guards a pile of golden dragons. Within the vault, any spell attempting to contact a creature or scry on the interior fails, and teleporting into the vault from outside is impossible.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a gold dragon guarding a pile of golden dragons. Any spell that tries to contact a creature in the vault fails, as does any spell that attempts to scry on the vault interior or any creatures within.

npcs.name: Aurinax
npcs.role: adult gold dragon named Aurinax, who is also the currentwielder and guardian of the dragonstaff of Ahghairon, which has the power to prevent other dragons from entering the city.

event_triggers: On approach: The statues animate only if the Stone of Golorr is not presented. Holding the Stone aloft causes them to bow and return to their alcoves.
On combat: The statues fight in perfect coordination, using shield-wall tactics.

content_hints.description: The vault is made of mortared stone, and any spell attempting to contact a creature or scry on the interior fails. Within, a gold dragon guards a pile of golden dragons.
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see a cavern so vast the far walls dissolve into shadow. In the center, rising from a mountain of golden coins that cascade down its flanks like a frozen waterfall, a gold dragon rests.

npcs.name: Aurinax
npcs.role: adult gold dragon who guards the vault

hazards.name: Frightful Presence aura (Wisdom save or frightened 1 minute)

event_triggers: On Stone presented: Aurinax recognizes the Stone of Golorr and stands, sending an avalanche of gold crashing across the floor. 'So. The game is ending at last.'

On negotiation success: Aurinax surrenders the dragonstaff and agrees to release the gold to whoever can prove rightful claim. He transforms into Barok Clanghammer and walks out, free for the first time in years.
On combat: Aurinax fights with restraint at first, using wing attacks and tail swipes to disarm rather than kill. Only uses breath weapon if reduced below half HP.

content_hints.description: The vault contains five hundred sacks, each containing 1,000 gp, totaling 500,000 gp, with a combined weight of 10,000 pounds. Scattered on the floor of the second alcove are sixty-five hundred gp gemstones, all that remains of Aurinax’s current food supply.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a vault piled high with wealth, with five hundred thousand gp resting in one alcove, the combined weight of which is ten thousand pounds. Scattered on the floor of the second alcove are sixty-five hundred gp gemstones, all that remains of Aurinax’s current food supply.
event_triggers: On discovery: The question is not how to take the gold. It is what happens to Waterdeep when everyone learns it exists.

content_hints.description: The Vault of Dragons guards a pile of golden dragons. All areas within the vault feature the following: any spell that tries to contact a creature in the vault fails, as does any spell that attempts to scry on the vault interior or any creatures within.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a gold dragon guarding a pile of golden dragons within the Vault of Dragons. Any spell attempting to contact a creature in this vault fails, and no spell can scry upon its interior or the creatures within.

npcs.name: Aurinax
npcs.role: a gold dragon who guards the vault

event_triggers: On forge examination: A plaque reads 'Forge of Kalain, Master Smith, Third Age of Melairkyn.' The name is recorded in no surviving history.

content_hints.description: A 20-foot-high, 20-foot-wide stone corridor ends before an adamantine double door bearing Dwarvish runes. The doors have neither handles nor hinges, and the writing on them reads, “THETHREE KEYS. BRING THEM FORTH.”
content_hints.read_aloud: > You see a 20-foot-high, 20-foot-wide stone corridor ending before an adamantine double door bearing Dwarvish runes. The doors have neither handles nor hinges, and the writing on them reads, “THETHREE KEYS. BRING THEM FORTH.”

npcs.name: Victoro Cassalanter
npcs.role: is in charge of locating the Vault of Dragons and securing the gold within it.

content_hints.description: The Vault of Dragons is guarded by a gold dragon who keeps a pile of golden dragons within. Within the vault, any spell attempting to contact a creature or scry on the interior fails, and teleporting into the vault from outside is impossible.
content_hints.read_aloud: You see a vertical shaft bores upward through solid rock, fitted with iron rungs hammered into the stone. Far above, a grate lets in a thin line of gray daylight that falls like a blessing after the darkness below.

npcs.name: Aurinax
npcs.role: adult gold dragon named Aurinax guards the vault.

hazards.name: Long climb (Athletics check, fall 60 ft on failure)

event_triggers: On exit: You emerge blinking into Waterdeep sunlight. The city goes about its business, unaware that half a million gold dragons lie beneath its streets.
